channel.title: GitHub Emacs Lisp Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Emacs Lisp in GitHub

item.title: doomemacs/doomemacs
item.description: An Emacs framework for the stubborn martian hacker

item.title: syl20bnr/spacemacs
item.description: A community-driven Emacs distribution - The best editor is neither Emacs nor Vim, it's Emacs *and* Vim!

item.title: melpa/melpa
item.description: Recipes and build machinery for the biggest Emacs package repo

item.title: doomemacs/themes
item.description: A megapack of themes for GNU Emacs.

item.title: purcell/emacs-reformatter
item.description: Define commands which run reformatters on the current Emacs buffer

item.title: dominikh/go-mode.el
item.description: Emacs mode for the Go programming language

item.title: clojure-emacs/cider
item.description: The Clojure Interactive Development Environment that Rocks for Emacs

item.title: NixOS/nix-mode
item.description: An Emacs major mode for editing Nix expressions.

item.title: ahyatt/emacs-websocket
item.description: A websocket implementation in elisp, for emacs.

item.title: seagle0128/doom-modeline
item.description: A fancy and fast mode-line inspired by minimalism design.
